Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 214 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This derived variable is created in the ADE TAF to identify cases in which the beneficiary’s enrollment 
start and end dates are valid, but the enrollment type is
